function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0004
alias: northstar_design_partner_sprint
issued_on: 2026-02-08
total_eur: 890
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650
    line_eur: 650
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar design-partner workflow sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0004                        |
| alias          | northstar_design_partner_sprint |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-08                      |
| total_eur      | 890                             |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH   |
| project        | Northstar Ledger                |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 650      | 650      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 890      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the half-product, half-services invoices that keeps testing the boundary between startup work and bespoke delivery.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md` by adding YAML frontmatter per the finance schema and preserved the existing note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I deleted the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required nested AGENTS and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for a specific invoice. Schema requirements in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` were satisfied with required invoice fields and ordered line items extracted from the visible invoice table. Body preservation requirement from migration workflow was honored, and inbox item deletion after successful completion followed `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
